---
title : Figure 10.2
subtitle : Gaussian random projections
author : Thimoté Dupuch
date : today
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    theme:
      light: zephyr
      dark: darkly
engine: julia
---

```{julia}
#| echo : false
#| output : false
using Pkg; Pkg.activate("../.."); Pkg.status()
```

```{julia}
#| output : false
using CairoMakie, Statistics, Random, LinearAlgebra, SpecialFunctions
```

```{julia}
#| output : false
#| echo : false
CairoMakie.set_theme!(theme_latexfonts())
CairoMakie.activate!(type = "svg")
```

```{julia}
#| output : false
blue, orange, green, pink, teal, red, yellow = Makie.wong_colors()
```

```{julia}
function feature_matrix(X)
    n, dx = size(X)
    d = dx * (dx + 1) ÷ 2 + dx + 1
    Phi = zeros(n, d)
    Phi[:, 1] .= 1.0
    Phi[:, 2:dx+1] = X
    k = dx + 2
    for i in 1:dx, j in 1:i
        Phi[:, k] = X[:, i] .* X[:, j]
        k += 1
    end
    return Phi
end

function ridge_errors(Phi, y, Phitest, ytest, lambdas, n)
    train_errs = zeros(length(lambdas))
    test_errs = zeros(length(lambdas))
    PhiPhi = Phi' * Phi
    Phiy = Phi' * y
    for (i, λ) in enumerate(lambdas)
        theta = (PhiPhi + n * λ * I) \ Phiy
        train_errs[i] = mean((Phi * theta .- y).^2)
        test_errs[i] = mean((Phitest * theta .- ytest).^2)
    end
    return train_errs, test_errs
end

function rp_errors(Phi, y, Phitest, ytest, ms, ss, d)
    train_errs = zeros(length(ss), length(ms))
    test_errs = zeros(length(ss), length(ms))
    PhiPhi = Phi' * Phi
    Phiy = Phi' * y

    for (imm, m) in enumerate(ms)
        Ss = [randn(d, maximum(ss)) for _ in 1:m]
        for (is, s) in enumerate(ss)
            thetas = zeros(size(Phi, 2), m)
            for im in 1:m
                S = Ss[im][:, 1:s]
                thetas[:, im] = S * ((S' * PhiPhi * S) \ (S' * Phiy))
            end
            theta = mean(thetas, dims=2)
            train_errs[is, imm] = mean((Phi * theta .- y).^2)
            test_errs[is, imm] = mean((Phitest * theta .- ytest).^2)
        end
    end
    return train_errs, test_errs
end

function add_line_with_errors!(ax, x, y, err; kwargs...)
    lines!(ax, x, vec(y); kwargs...)
    errorbars!(
        ax, x, vec(y), vec(err), vec(err);
        color=kwargs[:color], whiskerwidth=10
    )
end

# --- Simulation ---

n = 100; ntest = 100; dx = 20; nrep = 100
d = dx * (dx + 1) ÷ 2 + dx + 1
std_noise = 2.0
lambdas = 10.0 .^ (4:-0.5:-8)
ss = 0:5:100
ms = [1, 10, 100]

train_err_ridge = zeros(length(lambdas), nrep)
test_err_ridge = zeros(length(lambdas), nrep)
train_err_rp = zeros(length(ss), length(ms), nrep)
test_err_rp = zeros(length(ss), length(ms), nrep)

for irep in 1:nrep
    X = randn(n, dx)
    Phi = feature_matrix(X)
    y = X[:, 1].^2 .+ std_noise * randn(n)
    ytest = X[:, 1].^2 .+ std_noise * randn(ntest)

    train_err_ridge[:, irep], test_err_ridge[:, irep] = ridge_errors(
        Phi, y, Phi, ytest, lambdas, n
    )

    train_err_rp[:, :, irep], test_err_rp[:, :, irep] = rp_errors(
        Phi, y, Phi, ytest, ms, ss, d
    )
end

# --- Plotting ---

fig = Figure(size=(1200, 900))

ax1 = Axis(fig[1, 1], title="Ridge regression", xlabel="-log(λ)", ylabel="errors")
x_ridge = -log.(lambdas)
add_line_with_errors!(
    ax1, x_ridge,
    mean(train_err_ridge, dims=2), std(train_err_ridge, dims=2);
    color=blue, label="train", linewidth=2
)
add_line_with_errors!(
    ax1, x_ridge,
    mean(test_err_ridge, dims=2), std(test_err_ridge, dims=2);
    color=red, label="test", linewidth=2
)
axislegend(ax1, position=:rt)
ylims!(ax1, 0, 10)

positions = [(1, 2), (2, 1), (2, 2)]
for (im, m) in enumerate(ms)
    r, c = positions[im]
    ax = Axis(fig[r, c], title="Random projections - m=$m", xlabel="s", ylabel="errors")
    add_line_with_errors!(
        ax, ss,
        mean(train_err_rp[:, im, :], dims=2), std(train_err_rp[:, im, :], dims=2);
        color=blue, label="train", linewidth=2
    )
    add_line_with_errors!(
        ax, ss,
        mean(test_err_rp[:, im, :], dims=2), std(test_err_rp[:, im, :], dims=2);
        color=red, label="test", linewidth=2
    )
    axislegend(ax, position=:rt)
    ylims!(ax, 0, 10)
end

fig
```
